    L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.dispatchStructural_offset_gt
    L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.dispatchFlowIndicators_offset_gt
    L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.dispatchBlockIndicators_offset_gt
    L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.dispatchContent_offset_gt
    L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.dispatchStructural_none_noDoc
    L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.preprocess_peek_eq
    L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.scanNextToken_progress

    Scanner Correctness (P10.11a) #

    Proves that the scanner's scan function produces token streams that satisfy the ValidTokenStream specification from Grammar.lean.

    Main Result #

    theorem scan_produces_valid_tokens :
  ∀ input tokens, Scanner.scan input = .ok tokens → Grammar.ValidTokenStream input tokens

    This establishes the first bridge between the grammar specification and the implementation: the scanner's output satisfies the token stream contract that the parser relies on.

    Structure #

    §1 Token Envelope Properties #

    • scan_produces_streamStart — first token is always streamStart
    • scan_produces_streamEnd — last token is always streamEnd
    • scan_produces_at_least_two — at least 2 tokens (envelope invariant)

    §2 Position Monotonicity #

    • emit_preserves_position_order — appending tokens preserves ordering
    • advance_increases_offset — scanner progress is monotonic
    • scan_positions_ordered — final token array has monotonic positions

    §3 Main Correctness Theorem #

    • scan_produces_valid_tokens — composition of §1 and §2

    Status #

    Proven (no sorry, no axioms):

    • scanKey_adds_one_token — scanKey adds at least one token
    • emit_preserves_position_order — appending tokens preserves ordering
    • scanLoop_increases_tokens — loop increases token count by at least 1
    • scan_produces_at_least_two — scan output has at least 2 tokens
    • scanNextToken_preserves_ScanInv — scanNextToken preserves compound invariant
    • scanNextToken_preserves_AllKeysValid — scanNextToken preserves simple-key validity
    • Helper lemmas: advance_preserves_tokens, advance_preserves_flowLevel, emit_tokens_size, emit_preserves_tokens_at, pushMappingIndent_tokens_monotonic, pushSequenceIndent_tokens_monotonic, emitAt_tokens_size, scanFlowEntry_adds_one_token, scanBlockEntry_adds_tokens, collectAnchorNameLoop_preserves_tokens, all skipToContent* lemmas, scanValue_adds_tokens (via scanValue decomposition into 4 helpers)

    Position monotonicity infrastructure:

    • ScanInv / ScanInv' — compound invariant (ordered ∧ bounded)
    • emit_preserves_ScanInv — delegates to emit_preserves_position_order
    • advance_preserves_ScanInv — offset increases, tokens unchanged
    • field_update_preserves_ScanInv — field updates preserve invariant
    • unwindIndentsLoop_preserves_ScanInv — loop preserves invariant
    • unwindIndents_preserves_ScanInv — wrapper
    • scanLoop_ordered — induction on fuel
    • scan_positions_ordered — top-level theorem (0 sorry)
    source
    def L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.SimpleKeyAbove (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (n : Nat) :
    Prop

    Simple key invariant: all simple keys (current and stacked) have tokenIndex ≥ n. This is threaded through scanLoop to ensure that scanValuePrepare's setIfInBounds never overwrites tokens below n.

    Equations
    • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.
    Instances For

      §0 Helper Lemmas for scanLoop #

      These lemmas characterize the behavior of scanLoop, which is the structurally recursive helper function used by scan. They enable proving properties about scan via induction on the fuel parameter.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.advance_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      s.advance.tokens = s.tokens

      The advance operation preserves the token array.

      advance only modifies position fields (offset, line, col), never the tokens.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.advance_preserves_flowLevel (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      s.advance.flowLevel = s.flowLevel

      The advance operation preserves flowLevel.

      advance only modifies position fields, not flow state.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.advance_preserves_flowStack (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      s.advance.flowStack = s.flowStack

      The advance operation preserves flowStack.

      advance only modifies position fields, not flow state.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.emit_preserves_flowLevel (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (tok : YamlToken) :
      (s.emit tok).flowLevel = s.flowLevel

      The emit operation preserves flowLevel.

      emit only adds to tokens array, doesn't modify flow state.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.emit_preserves_flowStack (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (tok : YamlToken) :
      (s.emit tok).flowStack = s.flowStack

      The emit operation preserves flowStack.

      emit only adds to tokens array, doesn't modify flow state.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.emit_preserves_tokens_at (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (tok : YamlToken) (i : Nat) (h : i < s.tokens.size) :
      (s.emit tok).tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      The emit operation preserves existing tokens.

      For any index i < original size, tokens[i] remains unchanged.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.unwindIndentsLoop_tokens_monotonic (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (col : Int) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.unwindIndentsLoop s col fuel).tokens.size ≥ s.tokens.size

      Helper lemma: unwindIndentsLoop only appends tokens (never removes).

      This is proven by induction on fuel. Each iteration either returns the state unchanged or emits a blockEnd token (which adds exactly one token).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.unwindIndentsLoop_preserves_prefix (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (col : Int) (fuel i : Nat) (h_bound : i < s.tokens.size) :
      (Scanner.unwindIndentsLoop s col fuel).tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      Helper lemma: unwindIndentsLoop preserves the prefix of tokens.

      For any index i < original size, tokens[i] remains unchanged.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.unwindIndents_adds_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (col : Int) :
      (Scanner.unwindIndents s col).tokens.size ≥ s.tokens.size

      The unwindIndents operation preserves or adds tokens.

      When unwinding indents, we only emit blockEnd tokens, never removing any. So the token count increases or stays the same.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.unwindIndents_preserves_prefix (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (col : Int) (i : Nat) (h_bound : i < s.tokens.size) :
      (Scanner.unwindIndents s col).tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      unwindIndents preserves the prefix of tokens.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.unwindIndentsLoop_preserves_flowLevel (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (col : Int) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.unwindIndentsLoop s col fuel).flowLevel = s.flowLevel

      unwindIndentsLoop preserves flowLevel through all iterations. Each step does emit .blockEnd (preserves flowLevel) + record update on indents only (preserves flowLevel).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.unwindIndents_preserves_flowLevel (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (col : Int) :
      (Scanner.unwindIndents s col).flowLevel = s.flowLevel

      unwindIndents preserves flowLevel.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.saveSimpleKey_preserves_flowLevel (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.saveSimpleKey s).flowLevel = s.flowLevel

      saveSimpleKey preserves flowLevel.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.scanFlowEntry_preserves_flowLevel (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanFlowEntry s = Except.ok s') :
      s'.flowLevel = s.flowLevel

      scanFlowEntry preserves flowLevel on success.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.advanceNLoop_preserves_flowLevel (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (n : Nat) :
      (s.advanceNLoop n).flowLevel = s.flowLevel
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.advanceN_preserves_flowLevel (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (n : Nat) :
      (s.advanceN n).flowLevel = s.flowLevel
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.scanLoop_success_emits_streamEnd (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (fuel : Nat) (tokens : Array (Positioned YamlToken)) :
      Scanner.scanLoop s fuel = Except.ok tokens → ∃ (s' : Scanner.ScannerState), tokens = (s'.emit YamlToken.streamEnd).tokens

      scanLoop only succeeds by emitting streamEnd (generalized over all states).

      When scanLoop s fuel returns .ok tokens, those tokens came from a code path that includes final.emit .streamEnd. This means tokens.size = final.tokens.size + 1 where final = unwindIndents s (-1).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.advanceNLoop_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (n : Nat) :
      (s.advanceNLoop n).tokens = s.tokens

      saveSimpleKey preserves tokens.

      saveSimpleKey only modifies the simpleKey field.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.advanceN_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (n : Nat) :
      (s.advanceN n).tokens = s.tokens
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.saveSimpleKey_tokens_monotonic (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.saveSimpleKey s).tokens.size ≥ s.tokens.size

      saveSimpleKey preserves or grows the token array.

      saveSimpleKey either returns the state unchanged (identity/explicitKey branches) or pushes 2 placeholder tokens (reservation slots for key/blockMappingStart).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.saveSimpleKey_preserves_prefix (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (i : Nat) (h_bound : i < s.tokens.size) :
      have h := ⋯; (Scanner.saveSimpleKey s).tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      saveSimpleKey preserves existing token prefix.

      saveSimpleKey either returns the state unchanged or pushes 2 placeholders. In either case, tokens at existing indices are unchanged.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.scanFlowSequenceStart_adds_one_token (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceStart s).tokens.size = s.tokens.size + 1

      scanFlowSequenceStart adds exactly one token.

      After refactoring with explicit variable names (s_key_disabled, s_with_token, s_after_advance), the token flow is clear:

      • s_key_disabled.tokens = s.tokens (field update doesn't touch tokens)
      • s_with_token.tokens = s.tokens.push token (emit adds one)
      • s_after_advance.tokens = s_with_token.tokens (advance preserves)
      • final result.tokens = s_after_advance.tokens (field update doesn't touch tokens)

      Therefore: result.tokens.size = s.tokens.size + 1

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.scanFlowSequenceEnd_adds_one_token (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceEnd s).tokens.size = s.tokens.size + 1

      scanFlowSequenceEnd adds exactly one token.

      Same refactoring as scanFlowSequenceStart: emit → advance → structure update. Only emit modifies tokens (adds 1).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.scanFlowMappingStart_adds_one_token (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.scanFlowMappingStart s).tokens.size = s.tokens.size + 1

      scanFlowMappingStart adds exactly one token.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.scanFlowMappingEnd_adds_one_token (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.scanFlowMappingEnd s).tokens.size = s.tokens.size + 1

      scanFlowMappingEnd adds exactly one token.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.pushMappingIndent_tokens_monotonic (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (col : Int) :
      (Scanner.pushMappingIndent s col).tokens.size ≥ s.tokens.size

      pushMappingIndent preserves or adds tokens.

      When the current column is deeper than currentIndent, emits blockMappingStart (+1 token). Otherwise, the state is unchanged.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.pushSequenceIndent_tokens_monotonic (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (col : Int) :
      (Scanner.pushSequenceIndent s col).tokens.size ≥ s.tokens.size

      pushSequenceIndent preserves or adds tokens.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.emitAt_tokens_size (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (pos : YamlPos) (tok : YamlToken) :
      (s.emitAt pos tok).tokens.size = s.tokens.size + 1

      emitAt adds exactly one token (like emit but at a saved position).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.scanKey_adds_one_token (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanKey s = Except.ok s') :
      s'.tokens.size ≥ s.tokens.size + 1

      scanKey adds at least one token (on success).

      scanKey: conditional pushMappingIndent (≥0) → emit .key (+1) → advance (0). Total: ≥ s.tokens.size + 1.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.scanValueClearKey_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.scanValueClearKey s).tokens = s.tokens

      scanValueClearKey preserves the token array.

      scanValueClearKey only modifies simpleKey (or returns s unchanged), so the token array is identical.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.scanValueClearKey_identity_or_clear (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      Scanner.scanValueClearKey s = s ∨ (Scanner.scanValueClearKey s).simpleKey.possible = false ∧ (Scanner.scanValueClearKey s).tokens = s.tokens

      scanValueClearKey either returns s unchanged or clears simpleKey.possible. Used to transfer SimpleKeyValid through scanValueClearKey.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.scanValuePrepare_tokens_monotonic (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.scanValuePrepare s).tokens.size ≥ s.tokens.size

      scanValuePrepare preserves or adds tokens.

      Each branch of scanValuePrepare either:

      • overwrites placeholder slots via setIfInBounds (preserving token count),
      • calls pushMappingIndent (monotonic), or
      • returns an updated state with unchanged tokens.
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.scanValue_adds_tokens (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanValue s = Except.ok s') :
      s'.tokens.size ≥ s.tokens.size + 1

      scanValue adds at least one token (on success).

      scanValue is decomposed into four helpers: scanValueClearKey (preserves tokens) → scanValueValidate (error or ok ()) → scanValuePrepare (tokens monotonic) → emit .value (+1 token) → advance (preserves tokens) → scanValueTabCheck (error or ok ())

      The Except.bind chain is exposed via simp only [bind, Except.bind], then each branch is handled by split at h / contradiction / omega.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.consumeNewline_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.consumeNewline s).tokens = s.tokens

      Helper: consumeNewline preserves tokens.

      consumeNewline only calls advance and modifies needIndentCheck field.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipSpaces_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.skipSpaces s).tokens = s.tokens

      Helper: skipSpaces preserves tokens.

      skipSpaces now uses structural recursion via skipSpacesLoop (Scanner.lean:368-377). Proof by induction on fuel with advance_preserves_tokens.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipWhitespace_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.skipWhitespace s).tokens = s.tokens

      Helper: skipWhitespace preserves tokens.

      skipWhitespace now uses structural recursion via skipWhitespaceLoop (Scanner.lean:350-359).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipToEndOfLine_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.skipToEndOfLine s).tokens = s.tokens

      Helper: skipToEndOfLine preserves tokens.

      skipToEndOfLine now uses structural recursion via skipToEndOfLineLoop (Scanner.lean:386-395).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.collectCommentTextLoop_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (text : String) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.collectCommentTextLoop s text fuel).snd.tokens = s.tokens

      Helper: collectCommentTextLoop preserves tokens.

      collectCommentTextLoop only calls s.advance which preserves tokens.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipToContentWs_preserves_tokens (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.skipToContentWs s = Except.ok s') :
      s'.tokens = s.tokens

      Helper: skipToContentWs preserves tokens.

      skipToContentWs only calls skipSpaces and skipWhitespace (both proven to preserve tokens), plus field updates and error throws. No emit calls.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipToContentComment_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.skipToContentComment s).tokens = s.tokens

      Helper: skipToContentComment preserves tokens.

      skipToContentComment collects comment text into the comments side-channel via collectCommentTextLoop, which only calls advance and field updates. No emit calls — the tokens array is unchanged.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipToContentLoop_preserves_tokens (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (fuel : Nat) (h : Scanner.skipToContentLoop s fuel = Except.ok s') :
      s'.tokens = s.tokens

      skipToContentLoop preserves tokens.

      By induction on fuel. Each iteration:

      1. skipToContentWs preserves tokens (or errors out)
      2. skipToContentComment preserves tokens
      3. If line break: consumeNewline preserves tokens, { .. with simpleKeyAllowed } preserves tokens, then recurse
      4. Otherwise: return — tokens unchanged

      The refactoring from do+mut to explicit state threading (skipToContentWs, skipToContentComment) makes each step visible to unfold+split.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipToContent_preserves_tokens (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      Scanner.skipToContent s = Except.ok s' → s'.tokens = s.tokens

      skipToContent preserves tokens exactly.

      Proved by delegating to skipToContentLoop_preserves_tokens. The refactoring from do+mut to explicit state threading removed all monadic join points, making unfold+split proof-tractable. Zero axioms, zero sorry.

      flowLevel preservation through skipToContent chain #

      Each function in the skipToContent pipeline preserves flowLevel because none of them emit tokens or modify flow state.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.consumeNewline_preserves_flowLevel (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.consumeNewline s).flowLevel = s.flowLevel
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipSpaces_preserves_flowLevel (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.skipSpaces s).flowLevel = s.flowLevel
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipWhitespace_preserves_flowLevel (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.skipWhitespace s).flowLevel = s.flowLevel
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.collectCommentTextLoop_preserves_flowLevel (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (text : String) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.collectCommentTextLoop s text fuel).snd.flowLevel = s.flowLevel
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipToEndOfLineLoop_preserves_flowLevel (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.skipToEndOfLineLoop s fuel).flowLevel = s.flowLevel
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipToEndOfLine_preserves_flowLevel (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.skipToEndOfLine s).flowLevel = s.flowLevel
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.collectDirectiveNameLoop_preserves_flowLevel (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (name : String) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.collectDirectiveNameLoop s name fuel).snd.flowLevel = s.flowLevel
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.collectVersionMajorLoop_preserves_flowLevel (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (major : String) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.collectVersionMajorLoop s major fuel).snd.flowLevel = s.flowLevel
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.collectVersionMinorLoop_preserves_flowLevel (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (minor : String) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.collectVersionMinorLoop s minor fuel).snd.flowLevel = s.flowLevel
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.collectTagHandleDirectiveLoop_preserves_flowLevel (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (handle : String) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.collectTagHandleDirectiveLoop s handle fuel).snd.flowLevel = s.flowLevel
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.collectTagPrefixLoop_preserves_flowLevel (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (pfx : String) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.collectTagPrefixLoop s pfx fuel).snd.flowLevel = s.flowLevel
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.emitAt_preserves_flowLevel (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (pos : YamlPos) (tok : YamlToken) :
      (s.emitAt pos tok).flowLevel = s.flowLevel
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipToContentWs_preserves_flowLevel (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.skipToContentWs s = Except.ok s') :
      s'.flowLevel = s.flowLevel
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipToContentComment_preserves_flowLevel (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.skipToContentComment s).flowLevel = s.flowLevel
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipToContentLoop_preserves_flowLevel (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (fuel : Nat) (h : Scanner.skipToContentLoop s fuel = Except.ok s') :
      s'.flowLevel = s.flowLevel
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipToContent_preserves_flowLevel (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      Scanner.skipToContent s = Except.ok s' → s'.flowLevel = s.flowLevel

      Helper Lemmas for scan* Functions #

      Each scan* function called by scanNextToken either emits tokens or adds them via helper functions. These lemmas establish that tokens are only appended, never removed.

      Organized in ScanHelpers namespace to keep them separate from main API while remaining visible to verification tooling (never use private for theorems).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.collectPlainScalar_terminates?_state (c : Char) (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (content spaces : String) (inFlow : Bool) (result : Scanner.PlainScalarResult) (h : Scanner.collectPlainScalar_terminates? c s content spaces inFlow = some result) :
      result.state = s

      When collectPlainScalar_terminates? returns some result, the result state is unchanged.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.collectHexDigitsLoop_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (hex : String) (n : Nat) :
      (Scanner.collectHexDigitsLoop s hex n).snd.tokens = s.tokens

      Helper: collectHexDigitsLoop preserves tokens.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.parseHexEscape_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (n : Nat) (ch : Char) (s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.parseHexEscape s n = Except.ok (ch, s')) :
      s'.tokens = s.tokens

      Helper: parseHexEscape preserves tokens.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.processEscape_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (ch : Char) (s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.processEscape s = Except.ok (ch, s')) :
      s'.tokens = s.tokens

      Helper: processEscape preserves tokens.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.skipBlankLinesLoop_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (cnt fuel inputEnd : Nat) :
      (Scanner.skipBlankLinesLoop s cnt fuel inputEnd).snd.tokens = s.tokens

      Helper: skipBlankLinesLoop preserves tokens.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.foldQuotedNewlinesLoop_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (emptyCount fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.foldQuotedNewlinesLoop s emptyCount fuel).fst.tokens = s.tokens

      Helper: foldQuotedNewlinesLoop preserves tokens.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.foldQuotedNewlines_preserves_tokens (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (content : String) (h : Scanner.foldQuotedNewlines s = Except.ok (content, s')) :
      s'.tokens = s.tokens

      Helper: foldQuotedNewlines preserves tokens.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.collectPlainScalarLoop_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (content lastLine : String) (fuel : Nat) (inFlow : Bool) (contentIndent inputEnd : Nat) (result : Scanner.PlainScalarResult) :
      Scanner.collectPlainScalarLoop s content lastLine fuel inFlow contentIndent inputEnd = Except.ok result → result.state.tokens = s.tokens

      Helper: collectPlainScalarLoop preserves tokens.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.collectDoubleQuotedLoop_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (content : String) (fuel : Nat) (startPos : YamlPos) (inFlow : Bool) (currentIndent : Int) (inputEnd : Nat) (result : String × Scanner.ScannerState) :
      Scanner.collectDoubleQuotedLoop s content fuel startPos inFlow currentIndent inputEnd = Except.ok result → result.snd.tokens = s.tokens

      Helper: collectDoubleQuotedLoop preserves tokens.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.collectSingleQuotedLoop_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (content : String) (fuel : Nat) (startPos : YamlPos) (inFlow : Bool) (currentIndent : Int) (inputEnd : Nat) (result : String × Scanner.ScannerState) :
      Scanner.collectSingleQuotedLoop s content fuel startPos inFlow currentIndent inputEnd = Except.ok result → result.snd.tokens = s.tokens

      Helper: collectSingleQuotedLoop preserves tokens.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.collectAnchorNameLoop_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (acc : String) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.collectAnchorNameLoop s acc fuel).snd.tokens = s.tokens

      Helper: collectAnchorNameLoop preserves tokens.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanDocumentStart_adds_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.scanDocumentStart s).tokens.size ≥ s.tokens.size + 1

      scanDocumentStart adds at least one token.

      scanDocumentStart: unwindIndents (≥0) → emit .documentStart (+1) → advanceN 3 (preserves). Total: ≥ s.tokens.size + 1.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.skipDocEndWhitespace_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.skipDocEndWhitespace s fuel).tokens = s.tokens

      scanDocumentEnd adds at least one token (on success).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanDocumentEnd_adds_tokens (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanDocumentEnd s = Except.ok s') :
      s'.tokens.size ≥ s.tokens.size + 1
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.collectDirectiveNameLoop_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (name : String) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.collectDirectiveNameLoop s name fuel).snd.tokens = s.tokens

      collectDirectiveNameLoop preserves tokens.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.collectVersionMajorLoop_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (major : String) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.collectVersionMajorLoop s major fuel).snd.tokens = s.tokens

      collectVersionMajorLoop preserves tokens.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.collectVersionMinorLoop_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (minor : String) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.collectVersionMinorLoop s minor fuel).snd.tokens = s.tokens

      collectVersionMinorLoop preserves tokens.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.collectTagHandleDirectiveLoop_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (handle : String) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.collectTagHandleDirectiveLoop s handle fuel).snd.tokens = s.tokens

      collectTagHandleDirectiveLoop preserves tokens.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.collectTagPrefixLoop_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (pfx : String) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.collectTagPrefixLoop s pfx fuel).snd.tokens = s.tokens

      collectTagPrefixLoop preserves tokens.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanYamlDirective_monotonic (s s_after_ws : Scanner.ScannerState) (startPos : YamlPos) (s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h_ws : s_after_ws.tokens = s.tokens) (h : Scanner.scanYamlDirective s s_after_ws startPos = Except.ok s') :
      s'.tokens.size ≥ s.tokens.size

      scanYamlDirective is monotonic in token count.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanTagDirective_monotonic (s s_after_ws : Scanner.ScannerState) (startPos : YamlPos) (s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h_ws : s_after_ws.tokens = s.tokens) (h : Scanner.scanTagDirective s s_after_ws startPos = Except.ok s') :
      s'.tokens.size ≥ s.tokens.size

      scanTagDirective is monotonic in token count.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanDirective_monotonic (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanDirective s = Except.ok s') :
      s'.tokens.size ≥ s.tokens.size

      scanDirective is monotonic in token count (YAML/TAG add one, unknown preserves).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanAnchorOrAlias_adds_one_token (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (isAnchor : Bool) (s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (hok : Scanner.scanAnchorOrAlias s isAnchor = Except.ok s') :
      s'.tokens.size = s.tokens.size + 1

      scanAnchorOrAlias adds exactly one token (on success).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.collectVerbatimTagLoop_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (uri : String) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.collectVerbatimTagLoop s uri fuel).snd.snd.tokens = s.tokens

      Helper: collectVerbatimTagLoop preserves tokens.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.collectTagSuffixLoop_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (suffix : String) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.collectTagSuffixLoop s suffix fuel).snd.tokens = s.tokens

      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.collectTagHandleLoop_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (chars : String) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.collectTagHandleLoop s chars fuel).snd.snd.tokens = s.tokens

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanVerbatimTag_adds_one_token (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (pos : YamlPos) (s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (hok : Scanner.scanVerbatimTag s pos = Except.ok s') :
      s'.tokens.size = s.tokens.size + 1

      scanVerbatimTag adds exactly one token (on success).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanSecondaryTag_adds_one_token (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (pos : YamlPos) :
      (Scanner.scanSecondaryTag s pos).tokens.size = s.tokens.size + 1

      scanSecondaryTag adds exactly one token.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanNamedTag_adds_one_token (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (pos : YamlPos) (inputEnd : Nat) :
      (Scanner.scanNamedTag s pos inputEnd).tokens.size = s.tokens.size + 1

      scanNamedTag adds exactly one token.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanTag_adds_one_token (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (hok : Scanner.scanTag s = Except.ok s') :
      s'.tokens.size = s.tokens.size + 1

      scanTag adds exactly one token (on success).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.parseBlockHeaderLoop_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (chomp : ChompStyle) (offset : Option Nat) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.parseBlockHeaderLoop s chomp offset fuel).snd.snd.tokens = s.tokens

      parseBlockHeaderLoop preserves tokens (structural recursion on fuel).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.consumeExactSpaces_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (count : Nat) :
      (Scanner.consumeExactSpaces s count).snd.tokens = s.tokens

      consumeExactSpaces preserves tokens (structural recursion on count).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.collectLineContentLoop_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (content : String) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.collectLineContentLoop s content fuel).snd.tokens = s.tokens

      collectLineContentLoop preserves tokens (structural recursion on fuel).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.collectBlockScalarLoop_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (rawContent : String) (fuel contentIndent inputEnd : Nat) :
      (Scanner.collectBlockScalarLoop s rawContent fuel contentIndent inputEnd).snd.tokens = s.tokens

      collectBlockScalarLoop preserves tokens (structural recursion on fuel).

      scanBlockScalar sub-function preservation lemmas #

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanBlockScalarSkipComment_preserves_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.scanBlockScalarSkipComment s).tokens = s.tokens

      scanBlockScalarSkipComment preserves tokens.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanBlockScalarConsumeNewline_preserves_tokens (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanBlockScalarConsumeNewline s = Except.ok s') :
      s'.tokens = s.tokens

      scanBlockScalarConsumeNewline preserves tokens on success.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanBlockScalarBody_adds_one_token (s_orig s_nl : Scanner.ScannerState) (chomp : ChompStyle) (expl : Option Nat) (isLit : Bool) (startPos : YamlPos) (s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h_tok : s_nl.tokens = s_orig.tokens) (h : Scanner.scanBlockScalarBody s_orig s_nl chomp expl isLit startPos = Except.ok s') :
      s'.tokens.size = s_orig.tokens.size + 1

      scanBlockScalarBody adds exactly one token on success.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanBlockScalar_adds_one_token (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanBlockScalar s = Except.ok s') :
      s'.tokens.size = s.tokens.size + 1

      scanBlockScalar adds exactly one token (on success).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanDoubleQuoted_adds_one_token (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanDoubleQuoted s = Except.ok s') :
      s'.tokens.size = s.tokens.size + 1

      scanDoubleQuoted adds exactly one token (on success).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanSingleQuoted_adds_one_token (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanSingleQuoted s = Except.ok s') :
      s'.tokens.size = s.tokens.size + 1

      scanSingleQuoted adds exactly one token (on success).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanPlainScalar_adds_one_token (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanPlainScalar s = Except.ok s') :
      s'.tokens.size = s.tokens.size + 1

      scanPlainScalar adds exactly one token (on success).

      Bind helper lemmas for do-block proof decomposition #

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.bind_error_simp {ε α β : Type} {e : ε} {f : α → Except ε β} :
      (Except.error e).bind f = Except.error e

      Reduce Except.bind on a known .error constructor.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.bind_ok_simp {ε α β : Type} {v : α} {f : α → Except ε β} :
      (Except.ok v).bind f = f v

      Reduce Except.bind on a known .ok constructor.

      Struct update token-preservation lemmas #

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.needIndentCheck_update_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (b : Bool) :
      { input := s.input, inputEnd := s.inputEnd, offset := s.offset, line := s.line, col := s.col, indents := s.indents, flowLevel := s.flowLevel, tokens := s.tokens, simpleKey := s.simpleKey, simpleKeyStack := s.simpleKeyStack, simpleKeyAllowed := s.simpleKeyAllowed, needIndentCheck := b, allowDirectives := s.allowDirectives, seenYamlDirective := s.seenYamlDirective, directivesPresent := s.directivesPresent, documentEverStarted := s.documentEverStarted, flowStack := s.flowStack, explicitKeyLine := s.explicitKeyLine, comments := s.comments, definedAnchors := s.definedAnchors }.tokens = s.tokens

      Updating needIndentCheck preserves tokens.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.allowDir_ite_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (if s.allowDirectives = true then { input := s.input, inputEnd := s.inputEnd, offset := s.offset, line := s.line, col := s.col, indents := s.indents, flowLevel := s.flowLevel, tokens := s.tokens, simpleKey := s.simpleKey, simpleKeyStack := s.simpleKeyStack, simpleKeyAllowed := s.simpleKeyAllowed, needIndentCheck := s.needIndentCheck, allowDirectives := false, seenYamlDirective := s.seenYamlDirective, directivesPresent := s.directivesPresent, documentEverStarted := true, flowStack := s.flowStack, explicitKeyLine := s.explicitKeyLine, comments := s.comments, definedAnchors := s.definedAnchors } else s).tokens = s.tokens

      Updating allowDirectives/documentEverStarted preserves tokens.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.simpleKey_update_tokens (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (sk : Scanner.SimpleKeyState) :
      { input := s.input, inputEnd := s.inputEnd, offset := s.offset, line := s.line, col := s.col, indents := s.indents, flowLevel := s.flowLevel, tokens := s.tokens, simpleKey := sk, simpleKeyStack := s.simpleKeyStack, simpleKeyAllowed := s.simpleKeyAllowed, needIndentCheck := s.needIndentCheck, allowDirectives := s.allowDirectives, seenYamlDirective := s.seenYamlDirective, directivesPresent := s.directivesPresent, documentEverStarted := s.documentEverStarted, flowStack := s.flowStack, explicitKeyLine := s.explicitKeyLine, comments := s.comments, definedAnchors := s.definedAnchors }.tokens = s.tokens

      Updating simpleKey preserves tokens.

      scanFlowEntry and scanBlockEntry token bounds #

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanFlowEntry_adds_one_token (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanFlowEntry s = Except.ok s') :
      s'.tokens.size ≥ s.tokens.size + 1

      scanFlowEntry adds at least one token (on success).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanBlockEntry_adds_tokens (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanBlockEntry s = Except.ok s') :
      s'.tokens.size ≥ s.tokens.size + 1

      scanBlockEntry adds at least one token (on success).

      Dispatch helper monotonicity #

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.dispatchStructural_tokens_mono (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (c : Char) (s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchStructural s c = Except.ok (some s')) :
      s'.tokens.size ≥ s.tokens.size

      Structural dispatch preserves or adds tokens (on success).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.dispatchFlowIndicators_tokens_mono (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (c : Char) (s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchFlowIndicators s c = Except.ok (some s')) :
      s'.tokens.size ≥ s.tokens.size

      Flow indicator dispatch preserves or adds tokens (on success).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.dispatchBlockIndicators_tokens_mono (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (c : Char) (s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchBlockIndicators s c = Except.ok (some s')) :
      s'.tokens.size ≥ s.tokens.size

      Block indicator dispatch preserves or adds tokens (on success).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.dispatchContent_tokens_mono (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (c : Char) (s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchContent s c = Except.ok s') :
      s'.tokens.size ≥ s.tokens.size

      Content dispatch preserves or adds tokens (on success).

      Preprocess monotonicity and prefix preservation #

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.preprocess_tokens_mono (s s1 : Scanner.ScannerState) (c : Char) (h : Scanner.scanNextToken_preprocess s = Except.ok (some (s1, c))) :
      s1.tokens.size ≥ s.tokens.size

      Preprocess step preserves or adds tokens (on success with some result).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.preprocess_preserves_prefix (s s1 : Scanner.ScannerState) (c : Char) (h : Scanner.scanNextToken_preprocess s = Except.ok (some (s1, c))) (i : Nat) (h_bound : i < s.tokens.size) :
      s1.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      Preprocess step preserves existing token prefix.

      For any index i < original size, the preprocessed state's tokens[i] is unchanged. This follows from: skipToContent (tokens =), unwindIndents (prefix preserved), and saveSimpleKey (prefix preserved).

      Prefix preservation for scan functions #

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.emitAt_preserves_tokens_at (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (pos : YamlPos) (tok : YamlToken) (i : Nat) (h : i < s.tokens.size) :
      (s.emitAt pos tok).tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      emitAt preserves existing tokens (same pattern as emit_preserves_tokens_at).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.pushMappingIndent_preserves_prefix (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (col : Int) (i : Nat) (h : i < s.tokens.size) :
      (Scanner.pushMappingIndent s col).tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      pushMappingIndent preserves existing tokens.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.pushSequenceIndent_preserves_prefix (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (col : Int) (i : Nat) (h : i < s.tokens.size) :
      (Scanner.pushSequenceIndent s col).tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      pushSequenceIndent preserves existing tokens.

      Composition helpers for prefix preservation #

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.emit_chain_preserves_prefix (state : Scanner.ScannerState) (tok : YamlToken) {orig : Scanner.ScannerState} (h_tok : state.tokens = orig.tokens) (i : Nat) (h_i : i < orig.tokens.size) :
      (state.emit tok).tokens[i] = orig.tokens[i]

      If state.tokens = orig.tokens, then emit on state preserves prefix of orig.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.emitAt_chain_preserves_prefix (state : Scanner.ScannerState) (pos : YamlPos) (tok : YamlToken) {orig : Scanner.ScannerState} (h_tok : state.tokens = orig.tokens) (i : Nat) (h_i : i < orig.tokens.size) :
      (state.emitAt pos tok).tokens[i] = orig.tokens[i]

      If state.tokens = orig.tokens, then emitAt on state preserves prefix of orig.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.emit_unwind_preserves_prefix (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (n : Int) (sk : Scanner.SimpleKeyState) (tok : YamlToken) (i : Nat) (h_i : i < s.tokens.size) :
      ((have __src := Scanner.unwindIndents s n; { input := __src.input, inputEnd := __src.inputEnd, offset := __src.offset, line := __src.line, col := __src.col, indents := __src.indents, flowLevel := __src.flowLevel, tokens := __src.tokens, simpleKey := sk, simpleKeyStack := __src.simpleKeyStack, simpleKeyAllowed := __src.simpleKeyAllowed, needIndentCheck := __src.needIndentCheck, allowDirectives := __src.allowDirectives, seenYamlDirective := __src.seenYamlDirective, directivesPresent := __src.directivesPresent, documentEverStarted := __src.documentEverStarted, flowStack := __src.flowStack, explicitKeyLine := __src.explicitKeyLine, comments := __src.comments, definedAnchors := __src.definedAnchors }).emit tok).tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      Emit after unwindIndents preserves prefix.

      Per-function prefix preservation lemmas #

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanDocumentStart_preserves_prefix (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (i : Nat) (h_i : i < s.tokens.size) :
      (Scanner.scanDocumentStart s).tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      scanDocumentStart preserves token prefix.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanDocumentEnd_preserves_prefix (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanDocumentEnd s = Except.ok s') (i : Nat) (h_i : i < s.tokens.size) :
      s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      scanDocumentEnd preserves token prefix.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanYamlDirective_preserves_prefix (s s_after_ws : Scanner.ScannerState) (startPos : YamlPos) (s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h_ws : s_after_ws.tokens = s.tokens) (h : Scanner.scanYamlDirective s s_after_ws startPos = Except.ok s') (i : Nat) (h_i : i < s.tokens.size) :
      s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      scanYamlDirective preserves token prefix.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanTagDirective_preserves_prefix (s s_after_ws : Scanner.ScannerState) (startPos : YamlPos) (s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h_ws : s_after_ws.tokens = s.tokens) (h : Scanner.scanTagDirective s s_after_ws startPos = Except.ok s') (i : Nat) (h_i : i < s.tokens.size) :
      s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      scanTagDirective preserves token prefix.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanDirective_preserves_prefix (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanDirective s = Except.ok s') (i : Nat) (h_i : i < s.tokens.size) :
      s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      scanDirective preserves token prefix.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanFlowSequenceStart_preserves_prefix (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (i : Nat) (h_i : i < s.tokens.size) :
      (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceStart s).tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      scanFlowSequenceStart preserves token prefix.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanFlowSequenceEnd_preserves_prefix (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (i : Nat) (h_i : i < s.tokens.size) :
      (Scanner.scanFlowSequenceEnd s).tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      scanFlowSequenceEnd preserves token prefix.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanFlowMappingStart_preserves_prefix (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (i : Nat) (h_i : i < s.tokens.size) :
      (Scanner.scanFlowMappingStart s).tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      scanFlowMappingStart preserves token prefix.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanFlowMappingEnd_preserves_prefix (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (i : Nat) (h_i : i < s.tokens.size) :
      (Scanner.scanFlowMappingEnd s).tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      scanFlowMappingEnd preserves token prefix.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanFlowEntry_preserves_prefix (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanFlowEntry s = Except.ok s') (i : Nat) (h_i : i < s.tokens.size) :
      s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      scanFlowEntry preserves token prefix.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanBlockEntry_preserves_prefix (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanBlockEntry s = Except.ok s') (i : Nat) (h_i : i < s.tokens.size) :
      s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      scanBlockEntry preserves token prefix.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanKey_preserves_prefix (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanKey s = Except.ok s') (i : Nat) (h_i : i < s.tokens.size) :
      s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      scanKey preserves token prefix.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanAnchorOrAlias_preserves_prefix (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (isAnchor : Bool) (s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (hok : Scanner.scanAnchorOrAlias s isAnchor = Except.ok s') (i : Nat) (h_i : i < s.tokens.size) :
      s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      scanAnchorOrAlias preserves token prefix (on success).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanVerbatimTag_preserves_prefix (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (pos : YamlPos) (s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (hok : Scanner.scanVerbatimTag s pos = Except.ok s') (i : Nat) (h_i : i < s.tokens.size) :
      s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanSecondaryTag_preserves_prefix (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (pos : YamlPos) (i : Nat) (h_i : i < s.tokens.size) :
      (Scanner.scanSecondaryTag s pos).tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanNamedTag_preserves_prefix (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (pos : YamlPos) (inputEnd i : Nat) (h_i : i < s.tokens.size) :
      (Scanner.scanNamedTag s pos inputEnd).tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanTag_preserves_prefix (s s_ok : Scanner.ScannerState) (hok : Scanner.scanTag s = Except.ok s_ok) (i : Nat) (h_i : i < s.tokens.size) :
      s_ok.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      scanTag preserves token prefix (on success).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanBlockScalarBody_preserves_prefix (s_orig s_nl : Scanner.ScannerState) (chomp : ChompStyle) (expl : Option Nat) (isLit : Bool) (startPos : YamlPos) (s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h_tok : s_nl.tokens = s_orig.tokens) (h : Scanner.scanBlockScalarBody s_orig s_nl chomp expl isLit startPos = Except.ok s') (i : Nat) (h_i : i < s_orig.tokens.size) :
      s'.tokens[i] = s_orig.tokens[i]

      scanBlockScalarBody preserves token prefix.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanBlockScalar_preserves_prefix (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanBlockScalar s = Except.ok s') (i : Nat) (h_i : i < s.tokens.size) :
      s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      scanBlockScalar preserves token prefix.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanDoubleQuoted_preserves_prefix (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanDoubleQuoted s = Except.ok s') (i : Nat) (h_i : i < s.tokens.size) :
      s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      scanDoubleQuoted preserves token prefix.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanSingleQuoted_preserves_prefix (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanSingleQuoted s = Except.ok s') (i : Nat) (h_i : i < s.tokens.size) :
      s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      scanSingleQuoted preserves token prefix.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanPlainScalar_preserves_prefix (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanPlainScalar s = Except.ok s') (i : Nat) (h_i : i < s.tokens.size) :
      s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      scanPlainScalar preserves token prefix.

      Dispatch prefix preservation proofs #

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.dispatchStructural_preserves_prefix (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (c : Char) (s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchStructural s c = Except.ok (some s')) (i : Nat) (h_i : i < s.tokens.size) :
      s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      Structural dispatch preserves prefix.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.dispatchFlowIndicators_preserves_prefix (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (c : Char) (s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchFlowIndicators s c = Except.ok (some s')) (i : Nat) (h_i : i < s.tokens.size) :
      s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      Flow indicator dispatch preserves prefix.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanValuePrepare_preserves_prefix (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (n : Nat) (h_n : n ≤ s.tokens.size) (h_inv : s.simpleKey.possible = true → s.simpleKey.tokenIndex ≥ n) (i : Nat) (h_bound : i < n) :
      (Scanner.scanValuePrepare s).tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      scanValuePrepare preserves tokens at indices below n, given the simpleKey invariant.

      If simpleKey.possible, setIfInBounds operates at tokenIndex (≥ n) and tokenIndex+1 (≥ n), so indices below n are untouched. If not possible, tokens are either unchanged or grown via pushMappingIndent (append-only).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanValuePrepare_preserves_all_pos (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (h_skv : s.simpleKey.possible = true → s.simpleKey.tokenIndex < s.tokens.size ∧ s.simpleKey.tokenIndex + 1 < s.tokens.size ∧ (∀ (h1 : s.simpleKey.tokenIndex < s.tokens.size), s.tokens[s.simpleKey.tokenIndex].pos = s.simpleKey.pos) ∧ ∀ (h2 : s.simpleKey.tokenIndex + 1 < s.tokens.size), s.tokens[s.simpleKey.tokenIndex + 1].pos = s.simpleKey.pos) (i : Nat) (hi : i < s.tokens.size) :
      (Scanner.scanValuePrepare s).tokens[i].pos = s.tokens[i].pos

      scanValuePrepare preserves .pos at ALL existing token positions.

      When possible = false, no existing tokens are modified. When possible = true, setIfInBounds at idx and idx+1 replaces the token VALUE but the new element has .pos = simpleKey.pos, which equals the old .pos (from SimpleKeyValid). So .pos is preserved everywhere.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanValue_preserves_prefix (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanValue s = Except.ok s') (n : Nat) (h_n : n ≤ s.tokens.size) (h_inv : s.simpleKey.possible = true → s.simpleKey.tokenIndex ≥ n) (i : Nat) (h_bound : i < n) :
      s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      scanValue preserves tokens at indices below n, given the simpleKey invariant.

      Decomposes scanValue into scanValueClearKey → scanValueValidate → scanValuePrepare → emit → advance → scanValueTabCheck. The key step is scanValuePrepare, which uses setIfInBounds at simpleKey.tokenIndex ≥ n, so indices < n are preserved.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.scanValue_preserves_all_pos (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanValue s = Except.ok s') (h_skv : s.simpleKey.possible = true → s.simpleKey.tokenIndex < s.tokens.size ∧ s.simpleKey.tokenIndex + 1 < s.tokens.size ∧ (∀ (h1 : s.simpleKey.tokenIndex < s.tokens.size), s.tokens[s.simpleKey.tokenIndex].pos = s.simpleKey.pos) ∧ ∀ (h2 : s.simpleKey.tokenIndex + 1 < s.tokens.size), s.tokens[s.simpleKey.tokenIndex + 1].pos = s.simpleKey.pos) (i : Nat) (hi : i < s.tokens.size) :
      s'.tokens[i].pos = s.tokens[i].pos

      scanValue preserves .pos at ALL existing token positions. Requires SimpleKeyValid to establish that placeholder tokens at tokenIndex already have .pos = simpleKey.pos.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.dispatchBlockIndicators_preserves_prefix (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (c : Char) (s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchBlockIndicators s c = Except.ok (some s')) (n : Nat) (h_n : n ≤ s.tokens.size) (h_inv : s.simpleKey.possible = true → s.simpleKey.tokenIndex ≥ n) (i : Nat) (h_bound : i < n) :
      s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      Block indicator dispatch preserves prefix below n (needs simpleKey invariant for scanValue).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.ScanHelpers.dispatchContent_preserves_prefix (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (c : Char) (s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanNextToken_dispatchContent s c = Except.ok s') (i : Nat) (h_i : i < s.tokens.size) :
      s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

      Content dispatch preserves prefix.

      Main Theorems #

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.scanNextToken_adds_tokens (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      Scanner.scanNextToken s = Except.ok (some s') → s'.tokens.size ≥ s.tokens.size

      scanNextToken preserves or adds tokens.

      scanNextToken may emit tokens but never removes existing ones.

      Proof strategy: scanNextToken has the following structure:

      1. skipToContent - preserves tokens (no emit calls)
      2. unwindIndents - adds tokens (proven: unwindIndents_adds_tokens)
      3. saveSimpleKey - monotonic (proven: saveSimpleKey_tokens_monotonic)
      4. Match on character, calling one of ~17 scan* functions:
        • scanDocumentStart, scanDocumentEnd, scanDirective
        • scanFlowSequenceStart, scanFlowSequenceEnd
        • scanFlowMappingStart, scanFlowMappingEnd
        • scanFlowEntry, scanBlockEntry
        • scanKey, scanValue
        • scanAnchorOrAlias, scanTag
        • scanBlockScalar, scanDoubleQuoted, scanSingleQuoted, scanPlainScalar

      Each scan* function either:

      • Returns an error (handled by Except monad)
      • Returns a ScannerState that calls emit (which appends tokens)

      Complete proof requires: Analyze each scan* function to show it only appends tokens. This is mechanical but tedious (~17 functions × ~10-50 lines each).

      simpleKey Preservation Lemmas #

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.advance_preserves_simpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      s.advance.simpleKey = s.simpleKey
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.emit_preserves_simpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (tok : YamlToken) :
      (s.emit tok).simpleKey = s.simpleKey
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipSpacesLoop_preserves_simpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.skipSpacesLoop s fuel).simpleKey = s.simpleKey
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipWhitespaceLoop_preserves_simpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.skipWhitespaceLoop s fuel).simpleKey = s.simpleKey
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipToEndOfLineLoop_preserves_simpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.skipToEndOfLineLoop s fuel).simpleKey = s.simpleKey
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipSpaces_preserves_simpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.skipSpaces s).simpleKey = s.simpleKey
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipWhitespace_preserves_simpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.skipWhitespace s).simpleKey = s.simpleKey
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipToContentWs_preserves_simpleKey (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.skipToContentWs s = Except.ok s') :
      s'.simpleKey = s.simpleKey
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipToEndOfLine_preserves_simpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.skipToEndOfLine s).simpleKey = s.simpleKey
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.collectCommentTextLoop_preserves_simpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (text : String) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.collectCommentTextLoop s text fuel).snd.simpleKey = s.simpleKey

      Helper: collectCommentTextLoop preserves simpleKey.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipToContentComment_preserves_simpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.skipToContentComment s).simpleKey = s.simpleKey
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.consumeNewline_preserves_simpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.consumeNewline s).simpleKey = s.simpleKey
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipToContentLoop_preserves_simpleKey (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (fuel : Nat) (h : Scanner.skipToContentLoop s fuel = Except.ok s') :
      s'.simpleKey = s.simpleKey
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipToContent_preserves_simpleKey (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.skipToContent s = Except.ok s') :
      s'.simpleKey = s.simpleKey
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.unwindIndentsLoop_preserves_simpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (col : Int) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.unwindIndentsLoop s col fuel).simpleKey = s.simpleKey
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.unwindIndents_preserves_simpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (col : Int) :
      (Scanner.unwindIndents s col).simpleKey = s.simpleKey

      Loop-level simpleKey preservation lemmas #

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.collectHexDigitsLoop_preserves_simpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (hex : String) (n : Nat) :
      (Scanner.collectHexDigitsLoop s hex n).snd.simpleKey = s.simpleKey
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.parseHexEscape_preserves_simpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (n : Nat) (ch : Char) (s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.parseHexEscape s n = Except.ok (ch, s')) :
      s'.simpleKey = s.simpleKey
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.processEscape_preserves_simpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (ch : Char) (s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.processEscape s = Except.ok (ch, s')) :
      s'.simpleKey = s.simpleKey
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipBlankLinesLoop_preserves_simpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (cnt fuel inputEnd : Nat) :
      (Scanner.skipBlankLinesLoop s cnt fuel inputEnd).snd.simpleKey = s.simpleKey
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.foldQuotedNewlinesLoop_preserves_simpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (emptyCount fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.foldQuotedNewlinesLoop s emptyCount fuel).fst.simpleKey = s.simpleKey

      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.foldQuotedNewlines_preserves_simpleKey (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (content : String) (h : Scanner.foldQuotedNewlines s = Except.ok (content, s')) :
      s'.simpleKey = s.simpleKey
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.collectPlainScalarLoop_preserves_simpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (content lastLine : String) (fuel : Nat) (inFlow : Bool) (contentIndent inputEnd : Nat) (result : Scanner.PlainScalarResult) :
      Scanner.collectPlainScalarLoop s content lastLine fuel inFlow contentIndent inputEnd = Except.ok result → result.state.simpleKey = s.simpleKey
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.collectDoubleQuotedLoop_preserves_simpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (content : String) (fuel : Nat) (startPos : YamlPos) (inFlow : Bool) (currentIndent : Int) (inputEnd : Nat) (result : String × Scanner.ScannerState) :
      Scanner.collectDoubleQuotedLoop s content fuel startPos inFlow currentIndent inputEnd = Except.ok result → result.snd.simpleKey = s.simpleKey
      source

      Scanner.collectSingleQuotedLoop s content fuel startPos inFlow currentIndent inputEnd = Except.ok result → result.snd.simpleKey = s.simpleKey

      simpleKeyStack Preservation Lemmas #

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.advance_preserves_simpleKeyStack (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      s.advance.simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.emit_preserves_simpleKeyStack (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (tok : YamlToken) :
      (s.emit tok).simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipSpacesLoop_preserves_simpleKeyStack (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.skipSpacesLoop s fuel).simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack
      source

      (Scanner.skipWhitespaceLoop s fuel).simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack

      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipToEndOfLineLoop_preserves_simpleKeyStack (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.skipToEndOfLineLoop s fuel).simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack

      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipSpaces_preserves_simpleKeyStack (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.skipSpaces s).simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack

      (Scanner.skipWhitespace s).simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack

      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipToEndOfLine_preserves_simpleKeyStack (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.collectCommentTextLoop_preserves_simpleKeyStack (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (text : String) (fuel : Nat) :
      (Scanner.collectCommentTextLoop s text fuel).snd.simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack

      Helper: collectCommentTextLoop preserves simpleKeyStack.

      s'.simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack

      s'.simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack

      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.unwindIndentsLoop_preserves_simpleKeyStack (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (col : Int) (fuel : Nat) :

      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.saveSimpleKey_preserves_simpleKeyStack (st : Scanner.ScannerState) :

      Loop-level simpleKeyStack preservation lemmas #

      s'.simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack

      (Scanner.collectBlockScalarLoop s rawContent fuel contentIndent inputEnd).snd.simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.skipDocEndWhitespace_preserves_simpleKeyStack (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (fuel : Nat) :

      Full SimpleKeyAbove Preservation #

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.preprocess_preserves_simpleKeyStack (s s1 : Scanner.ScannerState) (c : Char) (h : Scanner.scanNextToken_preprocess s = Except.ok (some (s1, c))) :
      s1.simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.preprocess_simpleKey_inv (s s1 : Scanner.ScannerState) (c : Char) (h : Scanner.scanNextToken_preprocess s = Except.ok (some (s1, c))) (n : Nat) (h_n : n ≤ s.tokens.size) (h_inv : s.simpleKey.possible = true → s.simpleKey.tokenIndex ≥ n) :
      s1.simpleKey.possible = true → s1.simpleKey.tokenIndex ≥ n

      Preprocessing maintains the simpleKey part of the invariant.

      After scanNextToken_preprocess, if the preprocessed state s1 has simpleKey.possible = true, then simpleKey.tokenIndex ≥ n.

      This holds because:

      • skipToContent preserves simpleKey.
      • unwindIndents preserves simpleKey (only emits blockEnd tokens).
      • saveSimpleKey either: (a) returns unchanged (invariant preserved from input), or (b) sets tokenIndex := tokens.size ≥ n (fresh key at current position), or (c) returns unchanged (invariant preserved from input).
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.preprocess_maintains_simpleKeyAbove (s s1 : Scanner.ScannerState) (c : Char) (h : Scanner.scanNextToken_preprocess s = Except.ok (some (s1, c))) (n : Nat) (h_n : n ≤ s.tokens.size) (h_inv : SimpleKeyAbove s n) :
      SimpleKeyAbove s1 n

      advanceN preservation #

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.advanceNLoop_preserves_simpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (n : Nat) :
      (s.advanceNLoop n).simpleKey = s.simpleKey
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.advanceNLoop_preserves_simpleKeyStack (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (n : Nat) :
      (s.advanceNLoop n).simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.advanceN_preserves_simpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (n : Nat) :
      (s.advanceN n).simpleKey = s.simpleKey
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.advanceN_preserves_simpleKeyStack (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (n : Nat) :
      (s.advanceN n).simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack

      SimpleKeyAbove helper constructors #

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.SimpleKeyAbove_of_cleared_preserved (s_out s_in : Scanner.ScannerState) (n : Nat) (h_sk : s_out.simpleKey.possible = false) (h_stack : s_out.simpleKeyStack = s_in.simpleKeyStack) (h_inv : SimpleKeyAbove s_in n) :
      SimpleKeyAbove s_out n

      If simpleKey is cleared and stack preserved, SimpleKeyAbove holds.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.SimpleKeyAbove_of_preserved (s_out s_in : Scanner.ScannerState) (n : Nat) (h_sk : s_out.simpleKey = s_in.simpleKey) (h_stack : s_out.simpleKeyStack = s_in.simpleKeyStack) (h_inv : SimpleKeyAbove s_in n) :
      SimpleKeyAbove s_out n

      If both simpleKey and stack preserved, SimpleKeyAbove holds.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.SimpleKeyAbove_of_endLine_update (s_out s_in : Scanner.ScannerState) (n : Nat) (h_poss : s_out.simpleKey.possible = s_in.simpleKey.possible) (h_idx : s_out.simpleKey.tokenIndex = s_in.simpleKey.tokenIndex) (h_stack : s_out.simpleKeyStack = s_in.simpleKeyStack) (h_inv : SimpleKeyAbove s_in n) :
      SimpleKeyAbove s_out n

      If simpleKey.possible preserved and tokenIndex preserved, and stack preserved, SimpleKeyAbove holds (for endLine-only updates).

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.SimpleKeyAbove_of_flow_open (s_out s_in : Scanner.ScannerState) (n : Nat) (h_sk : s_out.simpleKey.possible = false) (h_stack : s_out.simpleKeyStack = s_in.simpleKeyStack.push s_in.simpleKey) (h_inv : SimpleKeyAbove s_in n) :
      SimpleKeyAbove s_out n

      Flow open: simpleKey cleared, old simpleKey pushed onto stack.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.SimpleKeyAbove_of_flow_close (s_out s_in : Scanner.ScannerState) (n : Nat) (h_sk : s_out.simpleKey = s_in.simpleKeyStack.back?.getD { }) (h_stack : s_out.simpleKeyStack = s_in.simpleKeyStack.pop) (h_inv : SimpleKeyAbove s_in n) (h_size : s_in.simpleKeyStack.size > 0) :
      SimpleKeyAbove s_out n

      Flow close: simpleKey restored from stack back, stack popped.

      Per-function simpleKey/simpleKeyStack property lemmas #

      emitAt preservation #

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.emitAt_preserves_simpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (pos : YamlPos) (tok : YamlToken) :
      (s.emitAt pos tok).simpleKey = s.simpleKey
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.emitAt_preserves_simpleKeyStack (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (pos : YamlPos) (tok : YamlToken) :
      (s.emitAt pos tok).simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack

      (Scanner.pushSequenceIndent s col).simpleKey = s.simpleKey

      (Scanner.pushSequenceIndent s col).simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack

      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.pushMappingIndent_preserves_simpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (col : Int) :
      (Scanner.pushMappingIndent s col).simpleKey = s.simpleKey
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.pushMappingIndent_preserves_simpleKeyStack (s : Scanner.ScannerState) (col : Int) :
      (Scanner.pushMappingIndent s col).simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack

      Per-function simpleKey/simpleKeyStack lemmas #

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.scanDocumentStart_clears_simpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.scanDocumentStart s).simpleKey.possible = false
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.scanDocumentStart_preserves_simpleKeyStack (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.scanDocumentStart s).simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack
      source

      s'.simpleKey.possible = false

      s'.simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.scanKey_clears_simpleKey (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanKey s = Except.ok s') :
      s'.simpleKey.possible = false
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.scanKey_preserves_simpleKeyStack (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanKey s = Except.ok s') :
      s'.simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.scanValuePrepare_clears_simpleKey (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.scanValuePrepare s).simpleKey.possible = false
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.scanValuePrepare_preserves_simpleKeyStack (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.scanValuePrepare s).simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.scanValue_clears_simpleKey (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanValue s = Except.ok s') :
      s'.simpleKey.possible = false
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.scanValue_preserves_simpleKeyStack (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanValue s = Except.ok s') :
      s'.simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack
      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.scanBlockScalarSkipComment_preserves_simpleKeyStack (s : Scanner.ScannerState) :
      (Scanner.scanBlockScalarSkipComment s).simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack

      scanBlockScalarSkipComment preserves simpleKeyStack.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.scanBlockScalarConsumeNewline_preserves_simpleKeyStack (s s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanBlockScalarConsumeNewline s = Except.ok s') :
      s'.simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack

      scanBlockScalarConsumeNewline preserves simpleKeyStack on success.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.scanBlockScalarBody_clears_simpleKey (s_orig s_nl : Scanner.ScannerState) (chomp : ChompStyle) (expl : Option Nat) (isLit : Bool) (startPos : YamlPos) (s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h : Scanner.scanBlockScalarBody s_orig s_nl chomp expl isLit startPos = Except.ok s') :
      s'.simpleKey.possible = false

      scanBlockScalarBody clears simpleKey on success.

      source
      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.ScannerCorrectness.scanBlockScalarBody_preserves_simpleKeyStack (s_orig s_nl : Scanner.ScannerState) (chomp : ChompStyle) (expl : Option Nat) (isLit : Bool) (startPos : YamlPos) (s' : Scanner.ScannerState) (h_sk : s_nl.simpleKeyStack = s_orig.simpleKeyStack) (h : Scanner.scanBlockScalarBody s_orig s_nl chomp expl isLit startPos = Except.ok s') :
      s'.simpleKeyStack = s_orig.simpleKeyStack

      scanBlockScalarBody preserves simpleKeyStack on success.

      source
